commands.name: add

options.name: --date
options.description:
The date for the dev-log entry (defaults to today). Format:
MM-dd-yyyy.

options.name: --folder
options.description:
The folder path where dev-log files are
stored.

arguments.name: project
arguments.description:
The name of the project to add the dev-log entry 
for.

commands.description: Add a project entry to this week's dev-log.
